commands.repair_reason: The remaining action is maintainer approval of the new public CLI backend config contract, not an automated repair.; Cleared: No concrete security or supply-chain concern found; the diff adds config/schema/docs/tests and an operator-controlled prompt-size value without new dependencies, CI, downloads, or secret handling. commands.review_summary:
The PR adds optional `agents.defaults.cliBackends.<id>.maxReseedHistoryChars` config/schema plumbing, passes it to CLI reseed prompt rendering, and updates tests, docs, and changelog text.

PR surface: Source +9, Tests +148, Docs +37. Total +194 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main has a renderer parameter for `maxHistoryChars` but the production prepare call does not pass any backend config value. The contributor also supplied terminal proof showing default truncation versus override behavior on a real session JSONL.
commands.review_followup: The remaining action is maintainer approval of the new public CLI backend config contract, not an automated repair.

target.title: fix(cli-runner): scale Claude CLI reseed history automatically
target.body:
## Summary
- Remove the proposed `maxReseedHistoryChars` config surface.
- Auto-scale Claude CLI reseed history from the resolved Claude context tier instead: 200K contexts keep a 64K-character reseed slice, and 1M Opus/Sonnet contexts use the bounded 256KiB cap.
- Keep non-Claude CLI backends on the existing conservative 12KiB cap.

Closes #83985

## Verification
- `pnpm docs:list`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/cli-runner/session-history.test.ts src/agents/cli-runner/prepare.test.ts` (98 passed before alias follow-up)
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/cli-runner/prepare.test.ts -t "automatic Claude CLI cap"`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/cli-runner/prepare.ts src/agents/cli-runner/prepare.test.ts src/agents/cli-runner/session-history.ts src/agents/cli-runner/session-history.test.ts src/config/types.agent-defaults.ts src/config/zod-schema.core.ts`
- `/Users/steipete/Projects/agent-scripts/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
- `pnpm check:changed` via Testbox `tbx_01kska2twjxb925xft9dj82hvb`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Claude CLI fresh-session reseed history was capped too tightly for long-context Claude runs, causing older transcript context to be dropped after a reseed.
Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw source checkout on macOS with the patched production CLI-runner module loaded through `tsx`; Blacksmith Testbox `tbx_01kska2twjxb925xft9dj82hvb` was used for supplemental changed-gate coverage.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran the production reseed-cap resolver with Node from the patched OpenClaw checkout, then ran the supplemental changed gate.
Evidence after fix: Terminal output from the patched OpenClaw checkout:
```text
$ node --import tsx -e 'import { resolveAutoCliSessionReseedHistoryChars, MAX_CLI_SESSION_RESEED_HISTORY_CHARS } from "./src/agents/cli-runner/session-history.ts"; console.log(JSON.stringify({default: MAX_CLI_SESSION_RESEED_HISTORY_CHARS, claude200k: resolveAutoCliSessionReseedHistoryChars(200000), claude1m: resolveAutoCliSessionReseedHistoryChars(1048576)}))'
{"default":12288,"claude200k":64000,"claude1m":262144}
```
Observed result after fix: A 200K Claude context resolves to 64,000 reseed characters, a 1M Claude context resolves to the bounded 262,144-character cap, and the default conservative cap remains 12,288 characters for non-Claude CLI paths.
What was not tested: A live Claude Code CLI subscription turn with real Anthropic credentials was not run; the runtime path was verified in the OpenClaw source checkout and with the changed gate.
target.author: adele-with-a-b
